title: WARK Vehicles Pack
description: Adds various industrial vehicles to Immersive Vehicles(MTS)
body:
WARK Vehicle is a simple content pack that gently improves the industrialization in Minecraft.

 

🌏 About WARK
WARK Industries typically includes a range of vehicles such as trucks, and trailers, as well as various customization options like different engines, paint jobs, and accessories. This allows players to customize their vehicles in the game to their liking. It's goal is to make your life easier while planning large scaled projects in Minecraft Worlds.

 

⚙️ About WARK Parts
The WARK Parts Pack is a content pack for the Minecraft mod Immersive Vehicles(Formerly known as Minecraft Transport Simulator). This content pack adds a variety of vehicles, parts, and accessories. It is designed to be used in conjunction with the Immersive Vehicles mod, which provides a framework for adding realistic vehicles to the game. The vehicles in the WARK Vehicle Pack are designed to be realistic, with functioning lights, container management, and many other features.

🎮 How to install
If you're interested in using the WARK Parts Pack, you'll need to have the Immersive Vehicles mod installed in your Minecraft game. You can then download the WARK Parts Pack and add it to your game's mods folder. Once the content pack is installed, you'll be able to access the new parts in the game.
